name: Biscotti Di Greve ( Orange Almond Biscotti)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups whole toasted almonds, chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together egg yolks, vanilla, and orange zest. Add this mixture to the flour mixture, stirring until a dough forms. Stir in the chopped almonds.
4. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead several times. Divide into two equal pieces.
5. Form each piece into a flattish log about 12 inches long and 2 inches wide. Place the logs at least 3 inches apart on a buttered baking sheet.
6. Brush the logs with beaten egg wash (1 egg yolk whisked with 1 tablespoon water).
7. Bake for 50 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes.
8. Cut the cooled logs crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices.
9. Place the biscotti cut sides down on the baking sheet and bake for an additional 15 minutes on each side.
10. Transfer to racks to cool completely. Store in airtight containers.
Makes about 48 biscuits.
